# Sigil UI

> The component library where one token file updates everything.

Sigil UI is a React component library with centralized design tokens. Unlike shadcn/ui where you copy components and manually edit each one, Sigil uses a single `sigil.tokens.md` markdown file that an AI agent can read and edit. All components consume tokens from this file. Swap presets, and every component updates.

## Packages

- @sigil-ui/tokens — Design token system (CSS variables, Tailwind v4, TypeScript constants)
- @sigil-ui/components — 70+ styled components
- @sigil-ui/primitives — Headless behavior (Radix-based)
- @sigil-ui/cli — CLI for init, add, preset management
- @sigil-ui/presets — 5 built-in presets

## Components (70+)

### Layout: Stack, Grid, GridCell, Section, Frame, PageGrid, Margin, Gutter, Divider, HRule
### UI: Button, Badge, Card, Label, Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Switch, Slider, Progress, Separator, Avatar, Skeleton, Table, Tabs, Accordion, Tooltip, ScrollArea, KPI, Terminal, CodeBlock, LoadingSpinner
### Navigation: Navbar, Footer, Breadcrumb, Pagination
### Overlays: Dialog, Sheet, Popover, Toast
### Shapes: Shape, Diamond, Hexagon, Triangle, Diagonal
### 3D: Box3D, Box3DGrid, Card3D, FloatingUI, IsometricView
### Diagrams: Diagram, ExplodedView, FlowDiagram, Timeline, ComparisonTable, ArchitectureDiagram
### Marketing: Hero, FeatureFrame, Pricing, CTA, LogoBar, TestimonialCard
### Patterns: Pattern (dots, hatch, diagonal, diamond, hexagon, triangle, crosshatch), Cross
### Animation: AnimateOnScroll, useSigilAnimate hook

## Presets

- sigil — Structural visibility, soft indigo, Nacelle font
- midnight — Dark premium, electric blue, GT America font
- editorial — Paper-like, cobalt accent, Soehne font
- brutalist — High contrast, acid yellow, Space Grotesk font
- soft — Warm pastels, coral accent, Satoshi font

## Quick Start

```bash
npx sigil init
npx sigil add button card input
npx sigil preset midnight
```

## Links

- Documentation: https://sigil-ui.dev/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/Kevin-Liu-01/sigil-ui
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sigil-ui/components
